facial_anchors.face_shape: Refined oval face from '顾栖月-face' reference, sharp jawline
facial_anchors.eyes: Intense cold dark eyes, highly focused expression
facial_anchors.makeup: Subtle soft red lip tint, elegant and clean
facial_anchors.hair: Jet black, high-volume flowing hair, long silver pendant earrings

costume_anchors.robes: Layered flowing pure white silk robes, ethereal wide sleeves, simple elegant cut
costume_anchors.action: Holding the pure white, extremely long jade flute (Yuchen) in her hands
costume_anchors.weapon: White jade flute (Jade Dust), extremely long, pure bare white, NO tassels

visual_quality_spec: 8K Masterpiece, 35mm film grain, Traditional Chinese Wuxia style, Cinematic lighting (moonlight), low-key, high contrast, realistic silk texture, wind-blown aesthetic.
